---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# Parameter

## single params

```{python}
from qiskit.circuit import QuantumCircuit, Parameter
theta = Parameter("θ") # define a param var.
 
param_circ = QuantumCircuit(3)
param_circ.rx(theta, 0)
param_circ.cx(0, 1)
param_circ.x(2)
 
param_circ.draw()
```

```{python}
import numpy as np
circ = param_circ.assign_parameters({theta: np.pi/2}) # assign a value to the parameter
circ.draw()
```

## params vector

```{python}
from qiskit.circuit import QuantumCircuit, ParameterVector
import numpy as np

theta = ParameterVector("θ", 3)

qc = QuantumCircuit(3)

qc.rx(theta[0], 0)
qc.ry(theta[1], 1)
qc.rz(theta[2], 2)

qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.cx(1, 2)

qc.draw()
```

```{python}
values = {
    theta[0]: np.pi / 2,
    theta[1]: np.pi / 4,
    theta[2]: np.pi,
}

bound_qc = qc.assign_parameters(values)
bound_qc.draw()
```

## params arr run
